title: pandorea australis subsp. pandorea
intro: Pandorea australis subsp. pandorea, also known as the Australian passionflower, is a flowering vine native to Australia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, antispasmodic, and sedative effects, making it a potential treatment for anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of pandorea australis subsp. pandorea include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as alleviating symptoms of menopause and other hormonal imbalances. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
